mapper.select: SELECT dl.log_id, dl.device_id, dl.user_id, u.user_name, b.branch_name, d.model_id, dm.model_name, d.battery_level, dl.last_used_date, dl.usage_time_per_day, dl.total_usage_time, dl.resp_rate_per_day, dl.steps_per_day, dl.total_steps, dl.last_location, dl.created_at, e.emergency_id, e.type_emergency, e.event_time AS emergency_time, e.status_emergency FROM device_log dl LEFT JOIN user u ON dl.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN device d ON dl.device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN branch b ON d.branch_id = b.branch_id LEFT JOIN device_model dm ON d.model_id = dm.model_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e1.emergency_id, e1.device_id, e1.type_emergency, e1.event_time, e1.status_emergency FROM emergency e1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM emergency WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY device_id ) e2 ON e1.device_id = e2.device_id AND e1.created_at = e2.max_created WHERE e1.deleted_at IS NULL ) e ON dl.device_id = e.device_id WHERE dl.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dl.created_at DESC

SELECT dl.log_id, dl.device_id, dl.user_id, u.user_name, b.branch_name, d.model_id, dm.model_name, d.battery_level, dl.last_used_date, dl.usage_time_per_day, dl.total_usage_time, dl.resp_rate_per_day, dl.steps_per_day, dl.total_steps, dl.last_location, dl.created_at, e.emergency_id, e.type_emergency, e.event_time AS emergency_time, e.status_emergency FROM device_log dl LEFT JOIN user u ON dl.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN device d ON dl.device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN branch b ON d.branch_id = b.branch_id LEFT JOIN device_model dm ON d.model_id = dm.model_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e1.emergency_id, e1.device_id, e1.type_emergency, e1.event_time, e1.status_emergency FROM emergency e1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM emergency WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY device_id ) e2 ON e1.device_id = e2.device_id AND e1.created_at = e2.max_created WHERE e1.deleted_at IS NULL ) e ON dl.device_id = e.device_id WHERE d.branch_id = #{branchId} AND dl.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY dl.created_at DESC

SELECT dl.log_id, dl.device_id, dl.user_id, u.user_name, b.branch_name, d.model_id, dm.model_name, d.battery_level, dl.last_used_date, dl.usage_time_per_day, dl.total_usage_time, dl.resp_rate_per_day, dl.steps_per_day, dl.total_steps, dl.last_location, dl.created_at, e.emergency_id, e.type_emergency, e.event_time AS emergency_time, e.status_emergency FROM device_log dl LEFT JOIN user u ON dl.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN device d ON dl.device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN branch b ON d.branch_id = b.branch_id LEFT JOIN device_model dm ON d.model_id = dm.model_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e1.emergency_id, e1.device_id, e1.type_emergency, e1.event_time, e1.status_emergency FROM emergency e1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT device_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM emergency WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY device_id ) e2 ON e1.device_id = e2.device_id AND e1.created_at = e2.max_created WHERE e1.deleted_at IS NULL ) e ON dl.device_id = e.device_id WHERE dl.user_id = #{userId} AND dl.deleted_at IS NULL AND DATE(dl.created_at) >= #{startDate} AND DATE(dl.created_at) <= #{endDate} ORDER BY dl.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_log (device_id, user_id, last_used_date, usage_time_per_day, total_usage_time, resp_rate_per_day, steps_per_day, total_steps, last_location, created_at) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{userId}, NOW(), #{usageTimePerDay}, #{totalUsageTime}, #{respRatePerDay}, #{stepsPerDay}, #{totalSteps}, #{lastLocation}, NOW())
